mapper.insert: insert into userscertificate (name, idCard, cerNumber, certificateId, image) values (#{name},#{idCard},#{cerNumber},#{certificateId},#{image})
mapper.select:
select uc.id,uc.cerNumber,c.title,c.startdate,c.expiredYear,c.trainUnit,uc.name,uc.image,uc.idCard from userscertificate uc join certificate c on uc.certificateId = c.id
and uc.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
